description: Align citation, dashboard, OSF, Hugging Face and archive records for a citable public product.

gates.evidence: HF dataset/Space destination report has zero mismatches.

The accountable owner approved the refreshed 64-test, 44-screenshot packet within its declared browser, route, automated accessibility and provenance scope; manual VoiceOver and universal WCAG conformance are excluded.

The v2 release-asset inventory requires wheel, sdist, source archive, both SBOMs, release manifest and attestation receipts. Signed final assets remain downstream of mapping, dashboard and OSF registration evidence gates.

A daily least-privilege monitor reads the exact registration, validates a canonical public snapshot when eligible, uploads redacted evidence and synchronizes one bounded issue #532 comment without OSF mutation.
The repository does not currently expose a ZENODO_TOKEN Actions secret. The workflow fails before remote mutation when the credential is absent.

Deterministic Zenodo/DataCite metadata, a fail-closed v2 inventory contract and token-gated plan/draft/reserve/publish/verify workflow exist. Draft, reservation and publication all require an active public OSF registration, the complete exact-tag archive gate and remote checksum parity. Papers and preprints are excluded.
